description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden desk with a dark brown finish and a rectangular tabletop. The desk features a raised back shelf that spans the width of the desk, supported by two small sets of drawers on either side. The legs are turned and robust, connected by horizontal stretchers for added stability. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a classic and slightly rustic appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with ample workspace on the main surface and additional storage in the small drawers. The finish shows some signs of age, adding to its antique character.
description: A large, dark brown wooden desk with a raised back shelf and small side drawers, featuring turned legs and a classic, vintage look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tabletop, raised back shelf, and two small drawers on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the tabletop, and the profile of the raised shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the raised shelf and the open space beneath it, with the stretchers and legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled profile of the desk and the structure of the legs and stretchers.
attribute_orientation: The side with the two small drawers and the open leg space is intended to face the user, with the raised shelf at the back for storage or display.
